name: Recess Peanut Butter Cups (Reeses)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 8 oz Hershey's milk chocolate with half a cup of peanut butter.
2. Melt one cup of peanut butter in a measuring cup set over boiling water.
3. Cut cupcake liners to size and place them in a cupcake tin.
4. Pour about one tablespoon of melted chocolate mixture into each liner.
5. Let the chocolate set for 20 minutes, then add approximately one tablespoon of peanut butter on top.
6. Allow the peanut butter to set for an additional 10 minutes before adding another layer of chocolate on top.
7. Set aside until fully set.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
